scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install
scripts.run: FPORT=${CONDUCTOR_PORT:-5173} && BPORT=$((FPORT + 1000)) && lsof -ti :$BPORT | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; (cd server && PORT=$BPORT CORS_ORIGIN=https://localhost:$FPORT node index.js &) && VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:$BPORT npx vite --port $FPORT
